name: ARPA-H PROSPR award funds TPN-101 healthy-aging program
summary: ARPA-H and Brown University sources describe a funded TPN-101/Censavudine program to test retrotransposon-linked reverse transcriptase inhibition for aging-related outcomes.
significance_note: The award is meaningful momentum for moving a direct LINE1/reverse-transcriptase aging program toward people, but it is a program update rather than an efficacy result or proof that the drug hit its intended target.
